details.productUrlName: Flusterstorm JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
Counter target instant or sorcery spell unless its controller pays 1.
Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. You may choose new targets for the copies.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"We sing of the night the sky fell and the hero who held the vault of heaven aloft."
—Legend of the Nomad Sage
